name: QUICKLOGIC Corp
summary: QuickLogic Corporation is a semiconductor company that develops low-power multi-core voice and sensor processing solutions, embedded FPGA (eFPGA) IP, and platforms for AI/ML at the edge. Its products include programmable FPGAs, eFPGA IP cores, and sensor processing solutions targeting IoT, defense, industrial, and consumer markets. The company also provides engineering services and contracts with the U.S. Government for defense-related applications.
